description: Shared DOCUMENT requires exclusive write access (mutex lock)
Reference DATABASE requires exclusive update access (mutex lock)
EDITOR cannot begin combining until both RESEARCHER_A and RESEARCHER_B have submitted their sections
Section submission channel from RESEARCHER_A and RESEARCHER_B to EDITOR carries completed sections
EDITOR decides whether sections are consistent or require revision
RESEARCHER_A and RESEARCHER_B investigate and write before submitting; EDITOR reviews after both submissions
Both RESEARCHER_A and RESEARCHER_B and the EDITOR need shared DOCUMENT lock for writing
Both RESEARCHER_A and RESEARCHER_B need reference DATABASE lock for updating citations
